name: @signicode/verser-common
description: Shared TypeScript utilities and primitives for Verser packages.

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts --format cjs --target es2019 --platform node --sourcemap --clean && dts-bundle-generator --project tsconfig.json --out-file dist/index.d.ts src/index.ts && node ../../scripts/copy-package-license.js .
